title: RecomputeDegreeResponse
description: v1.1.1 (P3): response emitted by `sqlite-graphrag graph recompute-degree` on stdout as a single JSON line. Summarizes one degree-reconciliation pass over `entities.degree` computed from the real `relationships` rows. Invariant: updated + zeroed + unchanged == total.

namespace.description: Namespace filter applied, or null when all namespaces are reconciled.

dry_run.description: True when the pass only reported divergences without writing; the transaction is rolled back.

total.description: Every entity scanned in the selected scope.

updated.description: Entities whose stored degree diverged and was reconciled to a non-zero real degree.

zeroed.description: Entities whose stored degree diverged and was reconciled to zero (no live edges).

unchanged.description: Entities whose stored degree already matched the real degree.

elapsed_ms.description: Wall-clock duration of the command in milliseconds.
